laws.title: Public Law 31-226 | Commerce and Labor Administrative Reform Act (CLARA)
laws.chronology_conclusion: The source is complete and the codification record already integrates the act, including the Department of Commerce and Labor restructuring, the 22 U.S.C. 2421 transfer note, and the 5 U.S.C. 101 replacement/history treatment.
laws.exact_enacted_text_or_amendment_command: Preserve the already-integrated Commerce and Labor restructuring, keep the U.S. Trade and Development Agency transfer note at 22 U.S.C. 2421, and retain the 5 U.S.C. 101 replacement/history note without duplicating the text.
source_evidence: codification/mass_migration/latest/reports/laws/PL-031-226.md marks the law ALREADY_INCORPORATED and says the project-generated U.S. Code already contains the operative changes.
usc/usc05.xml contains the Pub. L. 31-226 amendment note on section 101 in both the current branch and origin/main.
usc/usc22.xml contains the Pub. L. 31-226 USAR transfer note for 22 U.S.C. 2421 in both the current branch and origin/main.
laws.current_xml_comparison: Both the current branch and origin/main already contain the section 101 Commerce and Labor replacement/history note and the section 2421 Trade and Development Agency transfer note, so there is no remaining missing implementation to add.
laws.final_recommended_action: Leave the integrated text in place and do not duplicate the Commerce/Labor restructuring or the TDA transfer note.
